articles.title: Heavy to very heavy rainfall and heatwave warning issued for several states, list released | To read the entire bulletin issued by IMD | Inshorts - Inshorts
articles.full_text:
Heavy to very heavy rainfall and heatwave warning issued for several states, list released
IMD has issued rainfall and heatwave warning for several states/UTs for Thursday. Heavy to very heavy rainfall is likely over Arunachal Pradesh, Assam, Meghalaya, Kerala, Odisha, Sikkim, Andaman and Nicobar Islands, Bihar, Andhra Pradesh, Karnataka, West Bengal, Maharashtra, Goa, Lakshadweep, Nagaland, Manipur, Mizoram, Tripura, Tamil Nadu and Puducherry. Heatwave is likely over Rajasthan.
